creator: n-butcher@gol.com
text:
I had "CFLAGS= -O -pipe" in my make.conf, and it seems that linux-js is
allergic to the -O optimization flag.

It compiled ok when I removed that flag from CFLAGS


edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: linux-js appears broken
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
